description: Triggers when the user wants to add, fix, or optimize structured data and JSON-LD schema markup on their site for rich snippets
should_trigger: Add FAQ schema markup to my product page
How do I implement JSON-LD structured data for an Organization schema?
My product pages don't show rich snippets — how do I add Product schema with reviews?
Implement BreadcrumbList schema for my Next.js e-commerce site
Add schema.org markup to my blog posts to get Article rich results
How do I combine Organization, WebSite, and BreadcrumbList schema on my homepage?
Validate my schema markup — I'm getting errors in Google Search Console
should_not_trigger: Improve my page title and meta description
Set up Open Graph tags for social sharing
Create a sitemap.xml for my Next.js app
